goal: Verify position registry state across add, borrow, decrease, transfer, close, and external staking lifecycle branches.
minimal_state: position can be partially changed or moved across accounts/connectors
attacker_actions: inspect registry keys and TVL after each step
assertions: each active economic exposure has exactly one registry entry
position removal only happens when exposure is truly zero
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
